reforms.description: The government has been trying to group small businesses and provide them access to modern technology, including computers, to enhance their competitiveness.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing competitiveness through access to modern technology is likely to improve productivity and innovation among small businesses.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been actively pursued and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly supports small businesses but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: For some years now, the government has been trying to group small businesses and, above all, to give them the means of access to modern technology (including computers).

reforms.description: The government has provided direct financial aid to the footwear industry, which has significantly increased production and exports.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Direct financial aid to the footwear industry enhances production capabilities and export potential, contributing positively to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The financial aid has been successfully provided and is currently benefiting the industry.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform provides significant support to a specific sector but does not constitute a major overhaul of the innovation system.
reforms.source_quote: One example of outstanding success in this area has been the footwear industry where private enterprise, which is particularly active, has been substantially assisted by the government.
